issue: Duplicate subscription charge due to billing sync retry bug
fix: Verify the two charges in the billing dashboard, refund the duplicate, and note the customer's account for the known sync-retry bug (ticket ENG-4471).

issue: Export/report generation crash on large datasets
keywords: crashes every time i try to export
fix: Known issue with exports over 50k rows (ENG-4502, unresolved). Ask customer to filter date range and export in smaller batches as a workaround.

issue: Password reset not taking effect due to CDN cache
fix: Have the customer clear browser cache or use incognito; the auth CDN cache TTL is being reduced in the next release (ENG-4388).

issue: Regional outage affecting checkout and API endpoints
fix: Check current status page first. If matches active incident, link the status page and set expectation based on incident ETA rather than standard SLA.

issue: Account auto-lock after failed login threshold
fix: Accounts auto-lock after 5 failed attempts within 10 minutes. Verify identity, then manually unlock via admin panel.

issue: Data not missing, hidden by a client-side filter after last release
fix: Recent release changed default filters on the dashboard. Data is very rarely actually deleted -- check filter/date-range settings before assuming data loss.
